video_title: Top #DDD Mediterranean Videos with Guy Fieri | Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

dishes.description: Meat (beef/lamb) seasoned with garlic powder, basil, oregano, paprika, onion powder, salt, pepper, stacked on a spit, cooked on a rotisserie, shaved thin, served in pita with tzatziki.
dishes.guy_response: Incredible crust, but tender, outstanding. I might like that more than the Italian beef. You will be disappointed if you eat one anywhere else after that.

dishes.description: Beef tenderloin strips marinated in pureed onion juice, pepper, garlic powder, kosher salt, saffron water, tenderized with a knife, skewered, grilled, served with rice pilaf.
dishes.guy_response: The saffron butter, the filet, it is tender, not overcooked. I don't know which one I like better.

dishes.description: Chuck roll ground with onion pulp, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, beef stock, formed onto a one-inch skewer using a machine, grilled, served with rice pilaf.
dishes.guy_response: The way it's compressed gives it a different texture. You can't tell this is ground beef. I don't know which one I like better. The ground meat's a little bit lighter, and it is a lot. But as you can tell, I don't like it.

dishes.description: Layers of fried and baked potatoes, eggplant, and ground meat (beef/lamb) cooked with extra virgin olive oil, onions, garlic, bay leaves, pepper, cinnamon sticks, cloves, fresh tomatoes, tomato puree, topped with bechamel sauce, baked.
dishes.guy_response: It's really delicious. It's sort of a comfort food. Soft and creamy on top. It really blends well with the warm spices underneath.

dishes.description: Lamb and beef mixed with coriander, cumin seed, black peppercorn, currant, onion, roasted garlic, eggs, fresh garlic, cinnamon, red chili flake, fresh parsley, salt, formed into footballs, par-cooked, served with tomato relish, roasted garlic yogurt, tahini sauce, zatar, pomegranate molasses, and fresh pita.
dishes.guy_response: It's dynamite. The kofta is nice and tender. The tomato relish, crispy and bright. Everything is just done right and just fulfilling. The lamb meatballs have so much flavor, and the garlic yogurt. The yogurt sauce is really subtle, but really flavorful. Their flatbread is fresh and puffy.

dishes.description: Pizza dough (like pita dough) with a garlic potato spread, cubed mozzarella, chicken shawarma, artichoke hearts, mushrooms, onions, baked.
dishes.guy_response: The chicken is amazing. I mean, it's got such a big, full flavor. And I love that you kept spinning it, so almost every piece of meat had that caramelization. The cream sauce, you get that little touch of garlic, but the garlic isn't overtaking the pizza. Really nice crust. Outstanding, my friend.

dishes.description: Dough made with flour, eggs, salt, warm water, filled with ground beef mixed with pureed onion, black pepper, paprika, salt, Aleppo pepper, folded into small squares, boiled, served with a tomato garlic sauce (garlic, tomato paste, red pepper paste, dry mint, water, salt), yogurt sauce (yogurt, salt, garlic, water), and rice and noodle pilaf, topped with almonds.
dishes.guy_response: Wow. I love the tang and the brightness that comes from the tomato sauce. Beautiful. I feel the family heritage in this dish. The dumpling is nice and meaty, but the real body of the dish is the rice pilaf. It's really just an amazing dish. I mean, just flavor all the way through your palate. This is the kind of dish that's worth driving an hour across town to come and get.

dishes.description: Phyllo dough layered with a filling of sautéed onion, scallions, dill, black pepper, nutmeg, salt, spinach, feta cheese, and eggs, baked until golden and flaky.
dishes.guy_response: Oh, man. That is excellent. Man, that's great flavor. That's awesome. Flaky, the cheese inside. Absolutely excellent.

dishes.description: Leg of lamb cleaned, cooked in peanut oil with green cardamom, cardamom leaf, flaxseed, dried cardamom, bay leaves, cinnamon sticks, cumin, coriander, turmeric, saffron, Himalayan salt, pepper, garlic, ginger. Served with a sauce made from peanut oil, fennel seed, ajwan, cinnamon sticks, Korean cumin, turmeric, black Syrian cardamom, saffron, ginger, pureed garlic, cardamom leaves, Himalayan salt, bay leaf, tomato puree, sour cream, homemade yogurt, milk, simmered for hours. Garnished with dry cherry, raisins, cilantro, parsley.
dishes.guy_response: Are you kidding me? Fantastic. You are surrounded in flavor. Wow. You probably not have lamb this tender. This is like Mediterranean. This is like Mediterranean. Mediterranean bolognese. I'm sorry, I got to do it one more bite. Outstanding.

dishes.description: Lamb shanks trimmed, marinated in lemon juice, Greek oregano, black pepper, seasoned salt, fresh garlic, salt, Greek olive oil (using a vacuum tumbler for quick penetration), then baked covered for two hours, uncovered and flipped for another hour. Served with roasted potatoes, small Greek salad, pita breads, tzatziki sauce, and lemon.
dishes.guy_response: Mm, that's great. That's a really nice marinade. The lemon juice? Probably one of the more lemon-forward, lamb shanks I've ever had. Mm, you're going to have to take this away. Great.

dishes.description: Tri-tip beef marinated for two days in vinegar, white wine, oil, allspice, seven spice, black pepper, cardamom, salt, onions, bay leaves, lemon juice, stacked on a skewer with fat and onion, cooked on a rotisserie. Served with hummus (garbanzo beans, tahini, salt, garlic, lemon juice, olive oil), onion and sumac salad, parsley, tahini, and bread.
dishes.guy_response: It's really light and fluffy. I feel so warm up from the shawarma. The flavor of the lemon is incredible and how it sort of tenderizes the meat. There's so much flavor in the meat. And when you get that hummus with it, and the pilaf. That's a meal right there. Beautiful. This is the way I want to eat five nights a week. Delicious.

dishes.description: Ground meat (rib eye roll, short plate, chuck) mixed with ground red bell pepper, green bell peppers, white onions, jalapeños, turmeric, paprika, smoked paprika, chili powder, onion powder, black pepper, salt, formed onto skewers, grilled over mesquite. Served with basmati rice (with turmeric, garlic powder, chicken broth, vegetable oil), grilled Roma tomatoes, and a chimichurri sauce (green bell pepper, serrano, red bell pepper, garlic, white wine vinegar, avocado oil, salt).
dishes.guy_response: It's really delicious. It's very juicy. You could take that meat and do about anything you want with it. You can make a sandwich out of it. It's very good. The koubideh is wonderful. With ground chuck in particular, if you're actually grounding it yourself, that's why it tastes so much better. It tastes fresh. The chimichurri sauce, tangy, very savory. It teleports me to a new place.

dishes.description: Phyllo dough layered with a filling of sautéed white onion, green onions, dill, eggs, spinach, feta, salt, pepper, baked until golden and flaky.
dishes.guy_response: Mm, that's great. The dill, the dill actually really makes that. You know what it does? It complements really nice with the feta. Mm, that's good, dude. It's simple, done right. I'll eat that again. I'll eat that 36 more times. It's nice and creamy like quiche. And I love the layers of the crust. Very tasty.
